summary: Commit chunk_embeddings DDL into the schema source of truth (extend graph_bootstrap.py if it owns schema, otherwise add schema.sql)

resolution.note: DDL added to scripts/schema.sql (idempotent CREATE ... IF NOT EXISTS); re-applied against data/guru.db with existing 120 rows preserved. Added idx_chunk_embeddings_model so Phase 6 validate() can efficiently flag rows on the wrong model.
